Round Effect: Generated resources go to the command instead, players can spend command resources
Completion Condition: Command has more total resource than players combined
Completion Reward: Roll Dice 3 times generate resources = the numbers rolled once per resource
Failure Penalty: Lose all resources at command

Round Effect: Income +1 if another worker at location
Completion Reward: Players gain +1 income for each additional player at a location
Failure Penalty: Players lose -1 income for each additional player at a location

Round Effect: All income Halved
Completion Reward: All players gain 1 alien per turn
Failure Penalty: Increse Alien costs by 2

Round Effect: All income converted to Tech
Completion Reward: All players gain 5 Tech
Failure Penalty: Increse Tech costs of shops by 2

Round Effect: All income converted to Organic
Completion Reward: All players gain 5 Organics
Failure Penalty: Increse Organic costs of shops by 2

Round Effect: Players draw additional missions this turn
Completion Condition: Complete Mission of combined rank = Rank total of players
Completion Reward: All players gain +1 rank
Failure Penalty: All players -1 Rank

Round Effect: Friendly units have double HP
Completion Condition: Only field 1 unit in reserve for each lane
Completion Reward: Scouts reveal additional enemies
Failure Penalty: Cannot Activate reserve abilities

Round Effect: Active units are stunned if another active unit matches its type
Completion Reward: Active Units get +4 Shields for each unique unit type
Failure Penalty: Active Units Lose +4 Shields for each unique unit type

Round Effect: Active Non Infantry are stunned at start of combat
Completion Reward: Active Infantry gain +5 Shields for each active Infantry at combat start
Failure Penalty: Active Infantry Lose +5 Shields for each active Infantry at combat start

Round Effect: Active Non Infantry are stunned at start of combat
Completion Reward: Active Infantry gain +1 Armor for each active Infantry at combat start
Failure Penalty: Active Infantry Lose +1 Armor for each active Infantry at combat start

Round Effect: Active Non Mech are stunned at start of combat
Completion Reward: Active Mech gain +1 armor for each active Mech at combat start
Failure Penalty: Active Mech Lose +1 armor for each active Mech at combat start

Round Effect: Active Non Vehicles are stunned at start of combat
Completion Reward: Active Vehicles gain +1 armor for each active Vehicle at combat start
Failure Penalty: Active Vehicles Lose +1 armor for each active Vehicle at combat start

Round Effect: Double the activation cost of Armor Active effects this round
Completion Condition: Every lane active unit needs armor equipment
Completion Reward: Armor's Active effects can be activated for free this round
Failure Penalty: Armor activation costs doubled next round

Round Effect: Double the activation cost of Utility Active effects this round
Completion Condition: Every lane active unit needs Utility equipment
Completion Reward: Utility's Active effects can be activated for free this round
Failure Penalty: Utility activation costs doubled next round

Round Effect: Double the activation cost of Weapon Active effects this round
Completion Condition: Every lane active unit needs Weapon equipment
Completion Reward: Weapon's Active effects can be activated for free this round
Failure Penalty: Weapon activation costs doubled next round

Round Effect: Double the activation cost of all Gear Active effects this round
Completion Condition: have at least 1 unit fully equipped
Completion Reward: Gear's Active effects can be activated for free this round
Failure Penalty: All gear activation costs doubled next round

Round Effect: Unequip All Armor Equipment when drawing this event
Completion Condition: No Armor equiped at end of round
Completion Reward: initial shop Armor next round are free
Failure Penalty: Destroy all Armor

Round Effect: Unequip All Utility Equipment when drawing this event
Completion Condition: No Utility equiped at end of round
Completion Reward: initial shop Utility next round are free
Failure Penalty: Destroy all Utility

Round Effect: Unequip All Weapon Equipment when drawing this event
Completion Condition: No Weapons equiped at end of round
Completion Reward: initial shop Weapons next round are free
Failure Penalty: Destroy all Weapons

Round Effect: Unequip All Equipment when drawing this event
Completion Condition: No Equipment equiped at end of round
Completion Reward: initial shop items next round are free
Failure Penalty: Destroy all Equipment

Round Effect: Unlock all med bay slots this round
Completion Condition: All players place worker at medbay
Completion Reward: Double future Healing
Failure Penalty: Kill units in med bay

Round Effect: Medbay costs organics to heal
Completion Reward: Healing Generates organics
Failure Penalty: Healing costs organics with cap

Round Effect: Units Retire on death this round
Completion Condition: Retire Between 5 and 10 units this turn
Completion Reward: Retired units refund value duplicated to command
Failure Penalty: Retire costs no longer gives resource

Round Effect: Containment Block cells are emptied and hold 2 units each, Roll dice on when unit falls below half HP odds capture even kill
Completion Reward: Containment Block keeps storage stack upgrade
Failure Penalty: Disable a Containment Block slot

Round Effect: All unit HP and Damage = their rank total
Completion Condition: Outrank enemies in each lane at start of combat
Completion Reward: Promote Lowest rank player
Failure Penalty: Demote highest rank player

Round Effect: All units deal double damage
Completion Reward: Highest rank unit at start of combat gains double damage
Failure Penalty: Highest rank unit at start of combat Deals Half damage

Round Effect: Roll Dice to select locations
Completion Condition: Place worker at location rolled for each player
Completion Reward: Roll Dice 3 times generate resources at those location for all players regardless of worker
Failure Penalty: Effect persists after event

Round Effect: Roll Dice to select locations
Completion Reward: Draw an upgrade for each location (This upgrade is a bonus and not count towards requirments or limits)
Failure Penalty: -1 Location upgrade limit

Round Effect: Roll Dice to select locations
Completion Reward: Draw upgrades until location is full
Failure Penalty: -1 Location upgrade limit

Round Effect: Roll Dice to select location to disable until active locations = player count
Completion Reward: Bonuses to resources when alone
Failure Penalty: Penalty to resources when together at location

Round Effect: Group blind Votes on next commander
Completion Reward: Commander can willingly pass the role to another
Failure Penalty: Commander must change every turn

Round Effect: All enemies gain 5 shields, Deal double Damage to shields
Completion Reward: Scouted units lose shields
Failure Penalty: enemies enter with 10 shields

Round Effect: Set aside existing built upgrades for the round, restore after event resolves (overflow goes to commander hand)
Completion Reward: Can remove a built upgrade to free a slot when building
Failure Penalty: Strip all built upgrades at end of every round

Round Effect: All Units Deleted on death
Completion Condition: Kill more enemies than Units lost this round
Completion Reward: Enemies are deleted when killed by higher rank
Failure Penalty: Allies are Deleted when killed by higher rank
